title: panicum calvum
intro: Panicum calvum, also known as bald panicgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Panicum calvum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Panicum calvum is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or as a powder added to capsules or tinctures.
